summary.name: PEP
summary.oneLiner: PEP is a premium, light and refreshing protein drink that helps active people hit their protein goals conveniently, without the heaviness of traditional shakes.
summary.positioningStatement: For active, routine-minded people who struggle to hit their protein target, PEP is a premium, light and refreshing protein drink that provides convenient protein without heaviness, helping them feel good and keep moving through their day.
